vocab.meaning: ủng hộ, cổ vũ hết mình cho một đội/người nào đó
vocab.example: In my country, whenever the national football team plays, everyone stays glued to their screens to root for them.

vocab.meaning: gắn kết mọi người lại với nhau
vocab.example: Team sports are immensely popular because they have this unique ability to bring together people from all walks of life.

vocab.meaning: diễn ra, xảy ra (thường là một trận đấu hoặc tình huống)
vocab.example: It’s fascinating to watch how different strategies play out on the field during a high-stakes basketball match.

vocab.meaning: chuẩn bị sẵn sàng cho một sự kiện/trận đấu
vocab.example: Local communities often gear up for annual amateur tournaments, which create a very festive atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: đáp ứng được (kỳ vọng, danh tiếng)
vocab.example: The hype surrounding the derby match was huge, and fortunately, the players' performance really lived up to the billing.
While individual skills help a player stand out, in our culture, we value collective effort above all else.

vocab.meaning: vực dậy, hồi phục sau thất bại
vocab.example: Fans admire teams that can bounce back from a losing streak with even more determination.

vocab.meaning: gia tăng, bồi đắp (sức mạnh, sự tự tin hoặc sự phấn khích)
vocab.example: Participating in group sports is a fantastic way for children to build up their social skills and confidence.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu, khai mạc (thường dùng cho bóng đá)
vocab.example: The tournament is set to kick off next week, and the excitement in my neighborhood is already palpable.

vocab.meaning: dựa vào (một kế hoạch hoặc sự hỗ trợ khi gặp khó khăn)
vocab.example: In team sports, when an individual makes a mistake, they can always fall back on their teammates for support.
